aboutText:
I am a **product-focused full-stack engineer** with 6+ years of experience building web applications that balance performance, accessibility, and maintainability. 
 
 I enjoy working across the stack, from crafting intuitive frontend experiences in React and Next.js to designing reliable backend services and data flows. 
 
 Recently, I have been focused on **developer experience**, **design systems**, and shipping features with clear business impact.
